amplify.name: Amplify
amplify.description: Adds 5 Offense stacks with no change to contribution type.

consume.name: Consume
consume.description: Gains 10 Offense stacks by consuming 5 Defense and 5 Utility stacks.

saturate.name: Saturate
saturate.description: Adds 25 Offense stacks, but they no longer contribute to stats.
saturate.effectDescription: Offense stacks stop contributing to stats (still count for other passives)

compress.name: Compress
compress.description: Removes 10 Offense stacks, but each remaining stack is 50% more potent.
compress.effectDescription: Each remaining Offense stack is 50% more potent

convert1.name: Convert 1
convert1.description: Offense stacks now provide Headshot Damage at 3% per stack instead of Weapon Handling.
convert1.effectDescription: Offense → Headshot Damage (base 3% per stack) instead of Weapon Handling

convert2.name: Convert 2
convert2.description: Offense stacks now provide Magazine Size at 1% per stack instead of Weapon Handling.
convert2.effectDescription: Offense → Magazine Size (base 1% per stack) instead of Weapon Handling

split.name: Split
split.description: Redistributes 15 Offense stacks as 10 Defense and 10 Utility stacks.

pivotO.name: Pivot
pivotO.description: Boosts the current lowest module by increasing whichever module is currently the lowest.
pivotO.effectDescription: Increases whichever module is currently the lowest

invertO.name: Invert
invertO.description: Swap Offense stacks with the current highest module stacks. If Offense stacks are already the highest, or Defense and Utility stacks are tied for highest, nothing happens.
invertO.effectDescription: Swaps Offense stacks with the highest other module. Fails if Offense is already the highest, or if Defense and Utility are tied for highest.

stabilizeO.name: Stabilize
stabilizeO.description: Offense stacks are locked and cannot change.
stabilizeO.effectDescription: Offense stacks are frozen at their current value; all subsequent changes to Offense stacks are ignored.

amplifyD.name: Amplify
amplifyD.description: Adds 5 Defense stacks with no change to contribution type.

consumeD.name: Consume
consumeD.description: Gains 10 Defense stacks by consuming 5 Offense and 5 Utility stacks.

saturateD.name: Saturate
saturateD.description: Adds 25 Defense stacks, but they no longer contribute to stats.
saturateD.effectDescription: Defense stacks stop contributing to stats (still count for other passives such as Cascade/Convert)

compressD.name: Compress
compressD.description: Removes 10 Defense stacks, but each remaining stack is 50% more potent.
compressD.effectDescription: Each remaining Defense stack is 50% more potent

convert1D.name: Convert 1
convert1D.description: Defense stacks now provide Protection from Elites at 0.5% per stack instead of Max Armor.
convert1D.effectDescription: Defense → Protection from Elites (0.5%/stack base, 0.75%/stack with Compress+Nullify) instead of Max Armor.

convert2D.name: Convert 2
convert2D.description: Defense stacks now provide Hazard Protection at 1% per stack instead of Max Armor.
convert2D.effectDescription: Defense → Hazard Protection (1%/stack base, 1.5%/stack with Compress) instead of Max Armor.

splitD.name: Split
splitD.description: Redistributes 15 Defense stacks as 10 Offense and 10 Utility stacks.

pivotD.name: Pivot
pivotD.description: Boosts the current lowest module using Defense stacks.
pivotD.effectDescription: Increases the lowest module’s stacks using available Defense stacks. Useful in recovery builds.

invertD.name: Invert
invertD.description: Swap Defense stacks with the current highest module stacks. If Defense stacks are already the highest, or Offense and Utility stacks are tied for highest, nothing happens.
invertD.effectDescription: Swaps Defense stacks with the highest other module. Fails if Defense is already the highest, or if Offense and Utility are tied for highest.

stabilizeD.name: Stabilize
stabilizeD.description: Defense stacks are locked and cannot change.
stabilizeD.effectDescription: Defense stacks are frozen at their current value; all subsequent changes to Defense stacks are ignored.

amplifyU.name: Amplify
amplifyU.description: Adds 5 Utility stacks with no change to contribution type.

consumeU.name: Consume
consumeU.description: Gains 10 Utility stacks by consuming 5 Offense and 5 Defense stacks.

saturateU.name: Saturate
saturateU.description: Adds 25 Utility stacks, but they no longer contribute to stats.
saturateU.effectDescription: Utility stacks stop contributing to stats (still count for other passives)

compressU.name: Compress
compressU.description: Removes 10 Utility stacks, but each remaining stack is 50% more potent.
compressU.effectDescription: Each remaining Utility stack is 50% more potent

convert1U.name: Convert 1
convert1U.description: Utility stacks now provide Skill Repair at 1% per stack instead of Skill Damage.
convert1U.effectDescription: Utility → Skill Repair (1%/stack) instead of Skill Damage

convert2U.name: Convert 2
convert2U.description: Utility stacks now provide Status Effects at 1% per stack instead of Skill Damage.
convert2U.effectDescription: Utility → Status Effects (1%/stack) instead of Skill Damage

splitU.name: Split
splitU.description: Redistributes 15 Utility stacks as 10 Offense and 10 Defense stacks.

pivotU.name: Pivot
pivotU.description: Boosts the current lowest module by increasing whichever module is currently the lowest.
pivotU.effectDescription: Increases whichever module is currently the lowest

invertU.name: Invert
invertU.description: Swap Utility stacks with the current highest module stacks. If Utility stacks are already the highest, or Offense and Defense stacks are tied for highest, nothing happens.
invertU.effectDescription: Swaps Utility stacks with the highest other module. Fails if Utility is already the highest, or if Offense and Defense are tied for highest.

stabilizeU.name: Stabilize
stabilizeU.description: Utility stacks are locked and cannot change.
stabilizeU.effectDescription: Utility stacks are frozen at their current value; all subsequent changes to Utility stacks are ignored.

nullify.name: Nullify
nullify.description: Reverses all previous value changes on the lowest module — additions become subtractions and vice-versa.
nullify.effectDescription: Reverses additions/subtractions on the lowest stack module. Fails if two or more modules are tied for lowest. Invert passives are unaffected.

cascade.name: Cascade
cascade.description: Disables the highest module's stacks, then splits half its value (rounded up) equally into the other two modules.
cascade.effectDescription: Highest module's stacks stop contributing; +⌈highest/2⌉ stacks added to each other two modules. Fails if two or more tied for highest.

converge.name: Converge
converge.description: The lowest module gains the average of the other two modules' stacks; the other two are then reduced to 0.
converge.effectDescription: Lowest module = average of the other two, then the other two drop to 0. Fails if two or more tied for lowest.

equalize.name: Equalize
equalize.description: All three modules become equal to the middle stack value.
equalize.effectDescription: All modules set to the median stack count. Fails if the middle value is tied with the highest or lowest.

tips.heading: Best Combinations Guide
tips.description: Best modifier combinations ranked by total stat value. The order shown is the optimal slot sequence — slot order affects the final values.

priorityRanking.heading: Priority Purchase Ranking
priorityRanking.description: Modifiers ranked by multi-purpose versatility — covers the most stat categories. Buy these first for the best bang per in-game currency.

synergy.hint: Cards marked SYNERGY pair well with your current selection.

footer.line1: Tom Clancy's The Division 2 — Rise Up Y8S1
footer.line2: Modifier values are approximate and for reference only.

stats.empty: Select up to 3 modifiers to see combined stats
stats.warningPost: per module (fully upgraded). Results will differ with lower-tier modules.
